Project.NAME: japan-travel-rag-mcp
Project.keywords: japan-travel, mcp, proxy, tg-chat-rag, bearer-auth, tool-forwarding, contract-first, chat-allowlist
Project.annotation: v1 architecture is a thin MCP proxy over tg-chat-rag methods API. Public MCP surface exposes search_messages, get_message_context, get_related_messages, list_sources. list_chats is intentionally excluded. search_messages chat scope is enforced only from TG_CHAT_RAG_CHAT_IDS env.

M-CONFIG.NAME: Config
M-CONFIG.purpose: Runtime config validation for MCP server and tg-chat-rag integration settings.

fn-loadConfig.description: Validate env and return typed AppConfig

type-AppConfig.description: Configuration object including TG_CHAT_RAG_BASE_URL, TG_CHAT_RAG_BEARER_TOKEN, TG_CHAT_RAG_CHAT_IDS

M-LOGGER.NAME: Logger
M-LOGGER.purpose: Structured logging for boot lifecycle, tool proxying, validation decisions, and upstream errors.

M-TOOLS-CONTRACTS.NAME: ToolContracts
M-TOOLS-CONTRACTS.purpose: Schema and allowlist registry for MCP tools proxied in v1.

schema-SearchMessagesInputPublic.description: Public search_messages schema that forbids filters.chat_ids

const-PROXIED_TOOL_NAMES.description: Allowed tools: search_messages, get_message_context, get_related_messages, list_sources

M-TG-CHAT-RAG-CLIENT.NAME: TgChatRagClient
M-TG-CHAT-RAG-CLIENT.purpose: HTTP adapter for tg-chat-rag methods API with Bearer token authentication.

fn-callMethod.description: POST to /api/v1/methods/<tool_name> and return parsed response

type-UpstreamCallError.description: Normalized error payload for timeout, auth, and protocol failures

M-TOOL-PROXY.NAME: ToolProxyService
M-TOOL-PROXY.purpose: Tool-level proxy orchestration: validate input, enforce internal chat scope, forward request, normalize response.

fn-executeTool.description: Main proxy execution function for all exposed MCP tools

fn-buildSearchPayload.description: Inject filters.chat_ids from config and reject external chat_ids

M-TRANSPORT.NAME: McpTransport
M-TRANSPORT.purpose: MCP transport registration and request handling for the proxied tool set.

fn-registerTools.description: Register four MCP tools and wire handlers to ToolProxyService

fn-handleMcpRequest.description: Handle /mcp requests using streamable MCP transport

M-SERVER.NAME: ServerMain
M-SERVER.purpose: Process entrypoint with boot sequence and HTTP routes (/mcp, /healthz).

fn-main.description: Boot MCP proxy server and install graceful shutdown hooks

M-ROOT-ENTRYPOINT.NAME: RootEntrypoint
M-ROOT-ENTRYPOINT.purpose: Root runtime bootstrap that invokes server main and maps fatal startup failures to process exit code.

fn-bootstrap.description: Run server main() and handle fatal startup errors

M-TRANSPORT-SMOKE.NAME: McpTransportSmokeTests
M-TRANSPORT-SMOKE.purpose: Smoke validation for MCP transport tool surface and routing behavior.

fn-TransportSmokeTests.description: Smoke checks for tools/list and tools/call over registered transport surface

DF-PROXY-SEARCH.NAME: search_messages proxy flow
DF-PROXY-SEARCH.step-1: MCP caller invokes search_messages without chat_ids input.
DF-PROXY-SEARCH.step-2: M-TOOL-PROXY injects chat IDs from TG_CHAT_RAG_CHAT_IDS.
DF-PROXY-SEARCH.step-3: M-TG-CHAT-RAG-CLIENT forwards request to /api/v1/methods/search_messages with Bearer token.
DF-PROXY-SEARCH.step-4: Response is returned to caller in MCP format.

DF-PROXY-CONTEXT.NAME: get_message_context proxy flow
DF-PROXY-CONTEXT.step-2: M-TOOL-PROXY validates and forwards unchanged payload to /api/v1/methods/get_message_context.
DF-PROXY-CONTEXT.step-3: Response is returned to caller in MCP format.

DF-PROXY-RELATED.NAME: get_related_messages proxy flow
DF-PROXY-RELATED.step-2: M-TOOL-PROXY validates and forwards unchanged payload to /api/v1/methods/get_related_messages.
DF-PROXY-RELATED.step-3: Response is returned to caller in MCP format.

DF-PROXY-SOURCES.NAME: list_sources proxy flow
DF-PROXY-SOURCES.step-2: M-TOOL-PROXY validates and forwards unchanged payload to /api/v1/methods/list_sources.
DF-PROXY-SOURCES.step-3: Response is returned to caller in MCP format.

CrossLink.relation: reads runtime config for log setup
uses base URL, bearer token, and timeout settings
emits upstream request and failure logs
reads TG_CHAT_RAG_CHAT_IDS for enforced search scope
validates tool inputs and enforce allowlist
forwards validated tool calls to upstream methods API
emits proxy decisions and error mapping logs
registers MCP tools with public schemas
routes tool handlers to proxy execution
reads server port and startup settings
verifies transport tool exposure and request routing smoke behavior
